description.value:
Desperado

The Desperado is a gunslinger, a rogue, and a survivor who lives by their reflexes and their charm. They are quick on the draw, nimble on their feet, and always ready with a quip or a diversion. Desperados thrive in the chaos of combat and the uncertainty of life on the fringes, relying on luck, speed, and audacity to carry them through situations that would kill a lesser individual.

Role Aptitudes

Agility, Ballistic Skill, Defence, Fellowship, Finesse

Role Talent

Catfall or Quick Draw

Role Bonus

Move and Shoot: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, a Desperado may spend a Fate Point to perform a Full Action attack as a Half Action. This does not allow them to take another Full Action during this turn.

specialAbilities.name: Move and Shoot
specialAbilities.description: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, a Desperado may spend a Fate Point to perform a Full Action attack as a Half Action. This does not allow them to take another Full Action during this turn.
